title: UI adjustment: I’d like to have the whole app CSS more in a science fiction theme
description:
I've updated the CSS to align with a science fiction theme by:

- Using darker, metallic shades for backgrounds.
- Adding neon-like vibrant accent colors.
- Maintaining the sci-fi aesthetic with gradients and glows.

This should give the application a more futuristic appearance. If you need further customization or changes, just let me know!
